name: ASAP6b
description: ASAP6b (also known as ASAP6.2) is a next-generation positively tuned ASAP variant with the best per-molecule SNR for action potential detection. Demonstrates 33% ΔF/F response per action potential with high SNR in vivo imaging.

kinetics.notes: Mono-exponential time constant; operates at higher molecular brightness range for better SNR

dynamicRangeData.notes: Response to AP-like waveforms with 2-ms FWHM in HEK293 cells; best per-molecule SNR

researchPapers.title: ASAP6.1 and ASAP6b: genetically encoded voltage indicators with improved performance for two-photon imaging in vivo
researchPapers.authors: Sungmoo Lee, Guofeng Zhang, Laura C. Gomez, Yukun Alex Hao, Dongyun Jiang, Richard H. Roth, Guilherme Testa-Silva, Jun Ding, Thomas R. Clandinin, Daniel Feldman, Na Ji, Michael Z. Lin

spectrum.name: ASAP6b
spectrum.notes: Screening used 480/40nm excitation filter and 503-nm long pass emission
